title: selaginella basipilosa
intro: Selaginella basipilosa is a type of small, tropical fern-like plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella basipilosa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. It is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, often consumed as a tea or used in traditional remedies, although its availability and usage may vary.
